metadata.title: TELECOM | Reliable Provider
metadata.description: High-speed internet, mobile communication and TV+ for home and business in Kazakhstan.

speedtest_info.howItWorksDesc: We measure the speed between your device and our nearest servers in Kazakhstan. For the most accurate result, we recommend using a wired connection and disabling other downloads.
speedtest_info.ping: Ping: signal delay (the lower, the better).
speedtest_info.download: Download: speed of receiving data from the network.
speedtest_info.upload: Upload: speed of sending data to the network.

addressChecker.title: Check Availability by Address
addressChecker.subtitle: Find out if fiber-optic connection is available directly to your apartment or office.
addressChecker.placeholder: Enter your street and house number
addressChecker.availableTitle: Great news! Fiber connection is available at your address.
addressChecker.unavailableTitle: Unfortunately, connection is not yet available at this address.
addressChecker.availableDesc: — fiber-optic line passes to your house. Choose a plan and connect!
addressChecker.unavailableDesc: — we are already working on expanding the network. Leave a request — we will notify you when it's ready.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: JSC TELECOM is the national telecommunications operator of Kazakhstan. We create the country's digital infrastructure, connecting every home and every business with the modern world.

values.title: Our Values
values.reliabilityDesc: Uptime 99.9% — guaranteed connection stability 24/7 across all regions of Kazakhstan.
values.futureDesc: FTTH, 5G, IoT — we build the country's digital infrastructure and implement advanced solutions.
values.baseDesc: The largest subscriber base in Kazakhstan. Every third resident of the country is our client.
values.ecoDesc: Reducing carbon footprint, green energy, and responsible corporate governance.

cta.title: Become a TELECOM Client
cta.desc: Connect high-speed FTTH internet today and see the difference.

help.title: How can we help?
help.writeSupportDesc: Create a ticket in your dashboard, and we'll reply within 15 minutes.
help.callCenterDesc: Toll-free number for calls from mobile and landline phones in RK.
help.callMasterDesc: Apply for line diagnostics and router setup.
help.knowledgeBaseDesc: Equipment setup instructions, frequently asked questions (FAQ).
help.notFoundDesc: Our technical and financial support specialists will answer your question as soon as possible.

faqs.q: How to check balance and top up account?
faqs.a: You can check your balance in the Personal Account on the website or in the mobile application. You can top up your account with a bank card without commission directly in the 'Payment without registration' section or by going to the 'Payments' section in the Personal Account.

faqs.q: What to do if internet speed has dropped?
faqs.a: We recommend restarting your Wi-Fi router (unplug from the network for 10 seconds). Also make sure you are in an area of reliable signal reception or try connecting with a cable. If the problem persists, create a support request through the Personal Account.

faqs.q: How to transfer the contract to another person?
faqs.a: To transfer the contract, the current and new subscribers must jointly contact the nearest TELECOM subscriber office with identity cards and documents for the right of ownership of the apartment.

Basic configuration of the router provided by the provider is performed automatically by our engineers during installation. For manual configuration of details (network name, Wi-Fi password), go to the Personal Account, 'Help' section, where there is a detailed instruction for your router model.

admin.accessDeniedDesc: This section is only available to authorized system administrators.

footer.tagline: The largest telecommunications operator providing a full range of modern communication services.
